mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores WHERE business_number = #{businessNumber} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores ( user_id, store_name, business_number, business_status, business_verified_at, address, address_detail, industry_type, kitchen_capacity, open_time, close_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeName}, #{businessNumber}, #{businessStatus}, #{businessVerifiedAt}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{industryType}, #{kitchenCapacity}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stores WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, store_name, business_number, business_status, business_verified_at, address, address_detail, industry_type, kitchen_capacity, open_time, close_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM stores WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE stores
store_name = #{storeName},
business_number = #{businessNumber}, business_status = 'PENDING', business_verified_at = NULL,
address = #{address},
address_detail = #{addressDetail},
industry_type = #{industryType},
kitchen_capacity = #{kitchenCapacity},
open_time = #{openTime},
close_time = #{closeTime},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
